disk.name: FreeDOS Starter
disk.description: 22MB bootable FreeDOS with DOOM and Duke Nukem. Includes DPMI support. Small download.

disk.name: FreeDOS Hard Disk
disk.description: 200MB bootable hard disk with FreeDOS 1.4, 230 utilities, archivers, editors, and disk tools.

disk.name: DOS Games Collection
disk.description: 200MB hard disk with 11 classic shareware games: Duke Nukem, Bio Menace, Jill of the Jungle, God of Thunder, Supaplex, and more. Mount as D: drive.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.3 Boot Floppy
disk.description: FreeDOS 1.3 boot floppy (1.44MB). Boot and install to hard disk.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.2 Boot Floppy
disk.description: FreeDOS 1.2 boot floppy (1.44MB). Compatible with 8088 CPU.

disk.name: MS-DOS 6.22 Boot Floppy
disk.description: MS-DOS 6.22 setup disk 1 (1.44MB). Requires additional disks for full install.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.3 Full CD
disk.description: FreeDOS 1.3 full install CD-ROM image with all packages.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.3 Lite CD
disk.description: FreeDOS 1.3 lite CD-ROM image with base system only.
